steps.title: Find the causal relationship
steps.content: The passage states that box models lack organic realism, then immediately indicates that post-modeling processes are needed. These statements form a cause-and-effect pair: the limitation identified in the first clause directly necessitates the solution in the second clause.

steps.title: Apply the causal signal
steps.content:
”Consequently” conveys that post-modeling processes are a necessary result of the realism limitation—showing a direct causal link between problem and solution. “Similarly,” “in sum,” and “however” each suggest comparison, summary, or general contrast rather than causation.

A is correct.
